agents.name: criteria-resolver
agents.scope: Harden _resolve_plan_for_verify() to skip plans with empty exit_criteria; fix template indentation bug in _render_spec_template()

agents.name: verify-alignment
agents.scope: Update manager/SKILL.md verify Phase 3 to use plan criteria --json first; align planning-contract.md, planner/SKILL.md

agents.name: legacy-migration
agents.scope: Add _mark_plan_needs_backfill() and wire into _normalize_state() and _load_plan_from_summary(); mark plans 001-007 and 010 as needs_backfill

agents.name: lifecycle-tests
agents.scope: Add tests for: criteria resolver skipping invalid plans, legacy backfill marking, JSON-first criteria path, template indentation fix

agents.name: artifact-cleanup
agents.scope: Regenerate markdown docs for all plans from canonical JSON; verify round-trip consistency for plans 001-010

plan_elements.goal_statement: Complete plan lifecycle enforcement by hardening the criteria resolver, adding legacy plan migration, aligning verify to consume JSON first, expanding test coverage, and cleaning up stale artifacts.
exit_criteria: plan criteria --json returns the latest valid plan (skips plans with empty criteria)
Legacy plans 001-007 and 010 are marked needs_backfill in their JSON
manager verify Phase 3 uses plan criteria --json, not markdown parsing
_render_spec_template() output has no leading indentation (textwrap.dedent works)
test_plan_lifecycle.py covers resolver, legacy marking, JSON-first path, and template fix
All plans 001-010 have regenerated docs/campaign-*.md from canonical JSON
python -m pytest tests/ -q passes with 0 failures

conflict_zone_analysis.mitigation: AU owns; AV depends on AU (sequential)

integration_points: AU fixes resolver + template → AV uses fixed resolver to mark legacy plans
AU + AV + AW complete → AX tests all three
AX confirms green → AY regenerates artifacts

risk_assessment.risk: Legacy plan marking changes plan JSON shape
Template dedent fix changes spec output
risk_assessment.mitigation: Only affects newly generated specs, not existing filled specs

documentation_updates: manager/SKILL.md verify Phase 3 updated to JSON-first path
planning-contract.md clarified JSON as authoritative for verify
planner/SKILL.md mention plan criteria entry point

example_note: Historical source artifact imported from source-repo development. Paths and commands may be source-specific and are not package-neutral install guidance.
